creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text: I maintain mail/qmailadmin which is at 1.2.15. qmailadmin-devel is currently at 1.2.13. Because it is older, upstream development has ceased, and its PKGNAME conflicts with mail/qmailadmin (which is part of a new effort to have unique PKGNAMEs), I would like to remove this port.
